title: 大阪杯の後に・そして決着へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet overcomes stiff competition to win
the Osaka Hai. Vodka, who has briefly returned
to Japan, challenges her to a rematch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two will battle it out at the autumn Tenno
Sho, a race that holds the highest of honors for
senior racers.
